Premium Box Cricket Turf

Experience the best cricket turf in the city. Play day or night with professional lighting and high-quality artificial grass.

Book Your Slot

About Turf Box

We provide a premium sporting experience for cricket enthusiasts. Our turfs are built with top-grade materials to ensure safety and performance. Whether it is a friendly match or a corporate tournament, Turf Box is the perfect place.

Why Choose Us

24/7 Access

Play anytime you want. We are open 24 hours a day for everyone.

Pro Lighting

High quality floodlights that provide daylight visibility at night.

Best Grass

FIFA certified artificial turf for best grip, bounce and safety.

Turf Facilities

Team Dugouts

Clean Washrooms

Free Parking

Sports Equipment

Pricing

Night Slot

Booking Process

1

Check Availability

Select your preferred date and time slot.

2

Fill Details

Enter your contact information and team name.

3

Pay Online

Complete the payment to confirm your booking.
